requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Frequency and Voltage Settings

summary.en: Bahrain's electricity supply system operates at 50 Hz / 400 V (three-phase) and 230 V (single-phase). Solar PV inverters must be configured for 50 Hz grid frequency and must comply with EWA voltage tolerance requirements: voltage at the point of connection must not vary from rated voltage by more than ±6% under normal operating conditions, and connection or disconnection must not cause voltage variations exceeding 3% at the point of connection. Anti-islanding protection is required to prevent operation when the EWA grid section is de-energised. Inverters designed and pre-set for China's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V grid may require re-configuration for Bahrain's 230 V / 400 V nominal system.
summary.zh: 巴林电力供应系统采用50Hz / 400V（三相）和230V（单相）。光伏逆变器必须针对50Hz电网频率进行配置，并须符合EWA电压容差要求：正常运行条件下并网点电压不得偏离额定电压±6%，并网或解列不得导致并网点电压变化超过3%。须配备防孤岛保护，防止在EWA电网区段失电时继续运行。针对中国50Hz / 220V / 380V系统设计和预设的逆变器可能需要针对巴林230V / 400V额定系统重新配置。
summary.zht: 巴林電力供應系統採用50Hz / 400V（三相）和230V（單相）。光伏逆變器必須針對50Hz電網頻率進行配置，並須符合EWA電壓容差要求：正常運行條件下併網點電壓不得偏離額定電壓±6%，併網或解列不得導致併網點電壓變化超過3%。須配備防孤島保護，防止在EWA電網區段失電時繼續運行。針對中國50Hz / 220V / 380V系統設計和預設的逆變器可能需要針對巴林230V / 400V額定系統重新配置。

standards_or_laws: EWA technical requirements for distributed renewable energy generation (grid voltage and frequency tolerances)

summary.en: China's grid operates at 50 Hz, so frequency alignment is not itself a gap. However, China's nominal LV system is 220 V (single-phase) and 380 V (three-phase), while Bahrain uses 230 V / 400 V. Voltage set-point, under/over-voltage, and under/over-frequency trip thresholds must be verified and adjusted against EWA technical requirements before grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国电网采用50Hz，因此频率本身不存在差距。但中国低压额定系统为220V（单相）和380V（三相），而巴林使用230V / 400V。在并网前，必须根据EWA技术要求核验并调整电压设定点、欠/过压和欠/过频跳闸整定值。
summary.zht: 中國電網採用50Hz，因此頻率本身不存在差距。但中國低壓額定系統為220V（單相）和380V（三相），而巴林使用230V / 400V。在併網前，必須根據EWA技術要求核驗並調整電壓設定點、欠/過壓和欠/過頻跳閘整定值。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 (grid frequency and voltage settings for China-market inverters)

gap.en: Verify inverter firmware and hardware voltage range covers 230 V / 400 V nominal. Adjust trip thresholds and anti-islanding settings to EWA tolerances. Document settings in commissioning records for EWA-approved consultant review.
gap.zh: 核验逆变器固件和硬件电压范围是否覆盖230V / 400V额定值。根据EWA容差调整跳闸阈值和防孤岛整定。在调试记录中记录整定值，供EWA认可顾问审查。
gap.zht: 核驗逆變器固件和硬件電壓範圍是否覆蓋230V / 400V額定值。根據EWA容差調整跳閘閾值和防孤島整定。在調試記錄中記錄整定值，供EWA認可顧問審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected and net-metering installations; EWA voltage and anti-islanding requirements apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic grid connection under GB/T 19964-2024 and GB/T 37408-2019; thresholds differ from Bahrain

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Authority (EWA), Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain uses 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V. Inverters pre-set for China's 220 V / 380 V nominal voltages need voltage-range verification and protection-threshold adjustment before EWA grid connection. Document all settings for EWA-approved consultant sign-off.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林采用50Hz / 230V / 400V。针对中国220V / 380V额定电压预设的逆变器在EWA并网前需核验电压范围并调整保护阈值整定。记录所有整定值供EWA认可顾问签认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林採用50Hz / 230V / 400V。針對中國220V / 380V額定電壓預設的逆變器在EWA併網前需核驗電壓範圍並調整保護閾值整定。記錄所有整定值供EWA認可顧問簽認。
